description: A reader should accept ERROR before HELLO and still complete sync when the remaining transcript is valid.

assertions.description: Reader accepts the early ERROR without requiring a prior HELLO.
Reader still completes sync and stores the requested objects after the early ERROR.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with the remaining session-level acceptance proof for ERROR before HELLO.
The harness injects ERROR ahead of the generated HELLO but leaves the rest of the transcript unchanged.
